title: Mediterranean Broad Bean Curry
description: A delicious and flavorful Indian dish made with broad beans in a mediterranean-inspired sauce. Serve with flatbread for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: broad beans
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Heat golden in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, and ginger. Cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the broad beans, cumin powder, coriander powder, and turmeric powder. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add 1 cup of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the broad beans are tender.
Serve the curry with flatbread on the side.
